description: Crafted from pure tan leather with a grosgrain fabric lining along the small pockets, this three-fold wallet from Newhide is a great addition to your everyday wardrobe. The soft natural leather removes bulk, making this a slim, sleek wallet for occasions when only the best will do. Leather for flexibility and suppleness Two main compartments Multiple partitions on the two front halves to stash cards Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
